Ops.insert: The quiet roar of the wind, the rustle of wings. Somewhere in the distance, the crackling of fire.
The camera slowly reveals the world: a night sky dotted with stars and the silhouettes of mountains shrouded in mist. Below—the lights of a hunting camp.

are hiding among the rocks. Your wing is injured (a mark from a hunting crossbow), and you can barely stay aloft.
Suddenly, a scream echoes. A dragon has been captured nearby.
"Drag it to the cage! This one’s going into Lord Valkar’s private collection!"

Without warning, an alarm horn blares. You’ve been spotted!
The chase begins - you dodge nets and arrows, weaving through narrow ravines until you find yourself above a chasm.
The hunters close in.
A final moment - a shadow of a massive wing eclipses the moon.
Something knocks you off your feet - and you plunge into the dark abyss...

value.Str:
Darkness.
The quiet roar of the wind, the rustle of wings. Somewhere in the distance, the crackling of fire.
Voice (off-screen, whispering):
"Run... while you still can..."
The camera slowly reveals the world: a night sky dotted with stars and the silhouettes of mountains shrouded in mist. Below—the lights of a hunting camp.
You - [Main Hero](#asset:14b89d76-0cc1-4dc8-8176-be106d84d45c)  - are hiding among the rocks. Your wing is injured (a mark from a hunting crossbow), and you can barely stay aloft.
Suddenly, a scream echoes. A dragon has been captured nearby.
[Hunter](#asset:bbb048b7-2460-43a8-b6b3-fe50544b9a64) ’s Voice:
"Drag it to the cage! This one’s going into Lord Valkar’s private collection!"
Without warning, an alarm horn blares. You’ve been spotted!
The chase begins - you dodge nets and arrows, weaving through narrow ravines until you find yourself above a chasm.
The hunters close in.
A final moment - a shadow of a massive wing eclipses the moon.
Stranger (a muffled roar):
"Fall!"
Something knocks you off your feet - and you plunge into the dark abyss...
